close_reason: Integrated new architecture into tk rules command. Uses rulessync package to orchestrate extraction, mapping, and starlark-based writing.
description:
# Integration

Replace current rules.star sync implementation with new architecture.

## Tasks

- [ ] New tk rules sync implementation using:
  - Starlark object model for parsing/writing
  - Language extractors for dependency detection
  - Mapping layer for import → target conversion
  - Mutation API for applying changes
- [ ] Remove old implementation (src/go/pkg/rules/ detector/mapper files)
- [ ] Update documentation
- [ ] End-to-end tests

## Notes

No backwards compatibility needed - this hasn't been released publicly.
title: Phase 6: Integration
